ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., title or subject) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary description of the item */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the item (if applicable) */,
  "photographer" TEXT /* Photographer of the item (if applicable) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or digital location of the item */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the item (e.g., donated, purchased) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the item (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  "access_rights" TEXT /* Access rights for the item (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information of the item */,
  "keyword_tags" TEXT /* Additional keywords for better searchability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item the image corresponds to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file (e.g., JPEG, TIFF) */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to a thumbnail of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image for accessibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item the note is associated with */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note providing additional context */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., historical, technical) */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, educator, general public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the item */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Portraits, Events) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag for categorizing the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upload_logs" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the item */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the item was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who uploaded the item */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upload_logs_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upload_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image version */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the image version */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the image version */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to a thumbnail of the image version */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image version for accessibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
